ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of the instance (e.g., m4.large, c5.large) */,
  "owner_account" TEXT /* Account ID of the owner */,
  "location" TEXT /* Region where the instance is located */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the instance */,
  "tenancy" TEXT /* Tenancy type (e.g., Shared, Dedicated) */,
  "offering_class" TEXT /* Offering class (e.g., Standard, Convertible) */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Term length of the RI in years */,
  "payment_option" TEXT /* Payment option (e.g., All_Upfront, No_Upfront) */,
  "upfront_cost" REAL /* Upfront cost of the RI */,
  "recurring_monthly_cost" REAL /* Recurring monthly cost of the RI */,
  "instance_status" TEXT /* Current status of the instance (e.g., Running, Stopped, Terminated) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date and time the instance was launched */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date and time the instance was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "instance_age" INTEGER /* Age of the instance in days */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the instance record was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description or notes about the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_payment_option FOREIGN KEY ("payment_option") REFERENCES payment_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_tenancy FOREIGN KEY ("tenancy") REFERENCES tenancies ("tenancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_os FOREIGN KEY ("os") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_offering_class FOREIGN KEY ("offering_class") REFERENCES offering_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the recommendation */,
  "max_hourly_usage" INTEGER /* Maximum hourly usage in the historical period */,
  "min_hourly_usage" INTEGER /* Minimum hourly usage in the historical period */,
  "average_hourly_usage" REAL /* Average hourly usage in the historical period */,
  "max_normalized_unit_usage" REAL /* Maximum hourly normalized unit usage in the historical period */,
  "min_normalized_unit_usage" REAL /* Minimum hourly normalized unit usage in the historical period */,
  "average_normalized_unit_usage" REAL /* Average hourly normalized unit usage in the historical period */,
  "total_hours" INTEGER /* Total number of hours the instance was active */,
  "normalized_unit_hours" REAL /* Total normalized unit hours */,
  "peak_usage_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the instance had peak usage */,
  "low_usage_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the instance had the lowest usage */,
  "usage_trend" TEXT /* Trend analysis of the usage (e.g., Increasing, Decreasing, Stable) */,
  "usage_variance" REAL /* Variance in usage over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_metrics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_instance_type" TEXT /* Recommended instance type for RI purchase */,
  "size_flexible_recommendation" INTEGER /* Whether the recommendation is size flexible */,
  "projected_ri_utilization" REAL /* Projected utilization of the RI */,
  "recommended_instance_quantity" INTEGER /* Recommended quantity of instances to purchase */,
  "estimated_monthly_savings" REAL /* Estimated monthly savings from RI purchase */,
  "break_even_months" REAL /* Number of months to break even on the RI purchase */,
  "current_instance_type" TEXT /* Current instance type for comparison */,
  "current_monthly_cost" REAL /* Current monthly cost of the instance */,
  "recommended_ri_term" TEXT /* Recommended term for the RI */,
  "recommended_ri_payment_option" TEXT /* Recommended payment option for the RI */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* The status of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "zone_id" TEXT /* ID of the availability zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the availability zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the availability zone */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* A short code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "support_status" TEXT /* Support status (e.g., Supported, End-of-Life) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenancies" (
  "tenancy_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tenancy */,
  "tenancy_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenancy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenancy */,
  "default_tenancy" INTEGER /* Whether this is the default tenancy for the region */,
  "tenancy_cost" REAL /* The cost associated with the tenancy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenancy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offering_classes" (
  "class_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each offering class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the offering class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offering class */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* The discount rate associated with the offering class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_options" (
  "option_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each payment option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment option */,
  "upfront_discount" REAL /* The discount rate for upfront payments */,
  "recurring_discount" REAL /* The discount rate for recurring payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON format) */,
  "role_hierarchy" INTEGER /* The hierarchy level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's role */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance being accessed */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instance_types" (
  "type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instance type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instance type */,
  "vcpu" INTEGER /* Number of vCPUs */,
  "memory_gb" REAL /* Amount of memory in GB */,
  "storage_gb" REAL /* Amount of storage in GB */,
  "network_performance" TEXT /* Network performance (e.g., Moderate, High) */,
  "instance_family" TEXT /* The family of the instance type */,
  "instance_performance" REAL /* A performance rating of the instance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., upfront, recurring) */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date of the cost */,
  "cost_source" TEXT /* The source of the cost (e.g., On-Demand, RI, Savings Plan) */,
  "cost_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of the cost (e.g., Hourly, Daily, Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance related to the notification */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., warning, info) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the notification */,
  "notification_source" TEXT /* The source of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)
